about.title: About the Association
about.paragraph_1: Al-Ta'alouf Association was established in 2005 with the aim of providing humanitarian services to various segments of society, with a special focus on the most vulnerable and poorest.
about.paragraph_2: The association operates within a civilized environment through economic, social, developmental, medical, and educational projects.
about.paragraph_3: It is managed by a distinguished team of humanitarian workers.

card3.title: Community Protection and Returnee Support Project

card1.name: Mohammad Habbal
card1.content: One of the leading associations in Aleppo in humanitarian work across various sectors, distinguished by its institutional system and flexibility in responding to humanitarian crises. We had the honor of partnering in the health sector to implement a portfolio of projects in Aleppo since 2013 until now...

footer.description: Al-Ta'alouf Association was established in 2005 to provide humanitarian services to various segments of society.
